name: Disable Xbox Game DVR / App Capture
description: Disables background game capture and clip recording. Reduces CPU/GPU overhead during gaming.

name: Enable Windows Game Mode
description: Prioritizes CPU and GPU resources for the active game. Suppresses Windows Update installs and driver notifications during gameplay.

name: Enable Hardware-Accelerated GPU Scheduling (HAGS)
description: GPU manages its own VRAM scheduling — reduces CPU-GPU latency and improves frame pacing. Requires NVIDIA 10xx+, AMD RX 5000+, Intel 12th gen+. Reboot required.

name: Disable Fullscreen Optimizations Globally
description: Disables DWM fullscreen optimizations which can cause micro-stutters in some games. Per-game override is also available via .exe properties.

name: Disable Mouse Acceleration (Enhance Pointer Precision)
description: Disables the mouse acceleration curve for raw, consistent input. Highly recommended for FPS games.

name: Boost GPU & CPU Priority for Games
description: Sets Multimedia Class Scheduler to grant maximum GPU and CPU priority to game processes. Reduces stutters in CPU-limited scenarios.

name: Disable NVIDIA Telemetry Services
description: Disables NVIDIA's telemetry and update nag services. Does not affect GPU drivers or performance.

name: Activate Ultimate Performance Power Plan
description: Unlocks and activates the Ultimate Performance power plan — prevents all CPU throttling. Ideal for desktop gaming rigs. Not recommended for laptops.

name: Disable Xbox Game Bar Overlay (Win+G)
description: Fully disables the Xbox Game Bar overlay. Different from Game DVR — this removes the entire overlay UI (Win+G). Frees ~50 MB RAM during gaming.

name: Disable CPU Power Throttling
description: Disables Windows CPPC2 power throttling that can reduce CPU frequency for background processes. Ensures your game always gets full CPU power budget.

name: Remove Network Throttling Cap for Games
description: Removes the Windows multimedia network throttling limit (10 packets/ms) that can cause latency spikes in online games. Sets the limit to the maximum (0xFFFFFFFF).

name: Maximum CPU Time-Slice for Foreground App
description: Sets Win32PrioritySeparation to maximum foreground boost (short, variable quanta, full boost). The active game window gets more CPU time slices, reducing micro-stutters.

name: Disable Xbox Game Broadcast
description: Prevents Xbox Game Bar from broadcasting your gaming session to Xbox Live or other streaming platforms.

name: Disable Xbox Game Tips
description: Removes Xbox Game Bar tips and prompts that appear during gaming sessions.

name: Set Hardware-Accelerated GPU Scheduling to Auto
description: Sets HAGS to auto mode (2) which lets Windows decide based on GPU capability. Use this to revert a previous Force On/Off tweak.

name: Disable DirectX Agility SDK
description: Prevents apps from using the latest DirectX Agility SDK which may override your GPU driver settings. Useful if you pinned a specific driver version.

name: Disable GPU Memory Preemption
description: Disables GPU preemption so the GPU never interrupts a rendering task to service lower-priority work. Can reduce micro-stutters in compute-heavy games.

name: Set Power Platform Policy to Unmanaged
description: Sets the power profile policy to unmanaged (0) so the CPU never limits performance based on background activity. Maximum CPU performance at all times.

name: Disable All Xbox Game Bar Overlays
description: Completely disables all Xbox Game Bar overlay components — removes Win+G shortcut functionality and the entire overlay UI.

name: Disable Game DVR Recording and Broadcasting
description: Turns off Game DVR clip recording, background recording, and streaming in Xbox Game Bar.

name: Enable Game Mode with NVIDIA Low-Latency Mode
description: Enables Game Mode and sets NVIDIA GPU low-latency mode to Ultra for minimum input lag.

name: Disable Fullscreen Optimizations for All Games
description: Adds a global flag that disables DWM fullscreen optimizations for all applications (including games). More aggressive than per-game disabling.

name: Boost GPU Clock for Gaming
description: Sets the GPU minimum clock state to maximum to prevent GPU power throttling during gaming.

name: Set High Performance Power Plan for Gaming
description: Activates the High Performance power plan — eliminates CPU/GPU throttling during gaming sessions.

name: Enable Raw Input for Mouse
description: Enables raw mouse input by default — bypasses Windows mouse acceleration in all applications including games.

name: Disable Multimedia Network Throttling for Games
description: Removes the network throttling cap for multimedia and gaming traffic.

name: Disable Game Bar Auto-Start
description: Prevents Xbox Game Bar from automatically starting when you launch a game.

name: Set GPU Scheduler to Auto
description: Sets Hardware-Accelerated GPU Scheduling to auto — lets Windows decide based on GPU capability. Use this to reset any previous HAGS override.

name: Boost Audio Responsiveness for Gaming
description: Sets the audio buffer to 5ms and disables hardware offloading for lowest latency audio.

name: Disable Xbox Game Pass Community Features
description: Disables Xbox Game Pass community feeds and social features without disabling the service itself.
